title: AOODUERL Mr and Mrs Balloons Wedding Decoration, 9 Pcs Latex Ballons with glitter, Bride To Be Balloons Decoration Set, White Aluminum Foil Mr&Mrs Balloon, for Bridal Shower Hen Night Party
features: 【Wedding Balloon】1 Mrs Balloon, 1 Mr Balloon, 1 Love Balloon, 3 White Latex Balloon, 3 Gold Confetti Balloon.
【Material】made of high-quality natural rubber and aluminium foil, durable and safe.
【Design】printed in gold lettering Mr, Mrs, Love. Clear printing and bright colors.
【Anywhere Decoration】they are suitable for the entrance or chairs, dining table, arch decoration. Also the best props for photo booths.
【Widely Use】engagement, silver wedding, gold wedding, wedding anniversary, Valentine's Day, bridal couple's proposal, anniversary and other wedding events.
description: Product description These helium balloons wedding are perfect for creating a warm and inviting atmosphere at your wedding party. - Mr Mrs balloons, high-quality latex, unique font design, bold print, more eye-catching. - Suitable for engagement, wedding, wedding anniversary, etc. decoration and photography. - They can also be used as a wedding background, photo prop, room decoration or decoration for the wedding party. The beautiful combination of balloons will be a vibrant and beautiful memory of your wedding. Safety Warning Please don't over inflate the foil balloons, 80%-90% is the best.
